title: Slabfish'd Ribbits
description: Turns Ribbits' frog NPCs into Slabfish from Environmental
body:
This texture pack transforms Ribbits into Slabfish! Additionally, it gives the slabfish a prettier appearance and improves certain animations to better suit the Slabfish's very strong and very powerful physique™

Check the gallery for some in-game screenshots!

<hr>

![A Slabfish playing the bongo!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc81d98577a7bf07e8a75f4bdca37b0667ed0a22.gif)
